prompt: Be my PhD application copilot. Where am I across everything, and what should I do next?

assertions.text: Identifies Edinburgh as the hot, highest-leverage opportunity
Recommends a concrete next action (write the proposal) and routes to a skill
Correctly treats the Levine overdue follow-up as expected (do-not-email), not a failure
Prioritizes actions rather than dumping everything equally
Keeps applicant in control / honest framing (no false urgency)
